name: Openobserve
tagline: Cloud-native observability platform for logs, metrics, traces, RUM, errors and session replays — a 140x cheaper alternative to Elasticsearch, Splunk and Datad
description:
Cloud-native observability platform for logs, metrics, traces, RUM, errors and session replays — a 140x cheaper alternative to Elasticsearch, Splunk and Datad

Docs: https://openobserve.ai/docs/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  openobserve:
    image: public.ecr.aws/zinclabs/openobserve:v0.90.0
    environment:
      - ZO_DATA_DIR=/data
      - ZO_ROOT_USER_EMAIL=${ZO_ROOT_USER_EMAIL:-root@example.com}
      - ZO_ROOT_USER_PASSWORD=140272d543d62508e9105960ce0d124c
      - ZO_TELEMETRY=${ZO_TELEMETRY:-false}
      - ZO_COOKIE_SECURE_ONLY=${ZO_COOKIE_SECURE_ONLY:-true}
    volumes:
      - openobserve-data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - /openobserve
        - node
        - status
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42089:5080
volumes:
  openobserve-data: null
